title: Luscious Smoky Mexican Chicken Tacos
description: A flavorful, smoky Mexican dish featuring galangal paste, perfect for a romantic dinner.
instructions: In a small bowl, mix together cumin, coriander, salt, and black pepper.
Rub the spice mixture all over the chicken breasts.
Grill the chicken for 5-7 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Transfer the chicken to a cutting board and let rest for 5 minutes.
Meanwhile, heat the galangal paste in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the onion and garlic to the skillet and cook, stirring occasionally, until caramelized.
Stir in the chipotle peppers and cook for 1 minute.
Slice the grilled chicken into thin strips and add to the skillet.
Warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the tacos by placing a few pieces of the chicken onto a tortilla, followed by some of the onion and chipotle mixture.
Top with sour cream, a sprinkle of shredded radish, and a squeeze of lime juice.
